target:
You two were…  
Trying to save Shiori…?

It's not just memories…  
My power has returned…

I want you to see my final moments…  
The truth…

Let me replay the past…  
From Ushio Kofune's memory data…!!
Both of you, hold my hand.

Let's go!  
To July 21st's private beach…!!

Swimming weather!!  
Don't open your notebook!!

You still can't swim yet?!
How embarrassing~ ~, even Akari who's younger than you can swim!!

Even if you can't eat mushrooms,  
It's not embarrassing!!

It's pointless.  
This is just a "recording" of the past…  
We're just watching a video.

You can't touch or talk to them…  
Right, Ushio?
Ushio, where were you at that time?
This way, I think it was around there…

Looking at it like this…  
I guess I did gain a little weight…

Ugh! Stop it!!  
I'm self-conscious about it!!

But if we stay like this,  
Only one of us can be near Shiori…

That's a good idea!  
Can you become this necklace?

Ah, I see…!  
Yeah, I'll try!
(Shinpei saw Ushio transforming into a seashell necklace!!)

I became this necklace,  
And was worn by Ushio.

Since "things" have less data than humans,  
Even if I overwrite a little,  
My self wouldn't disappear.

I took off the real necklace,  
And put it back in the pool bag.

Then, I joined everyone  
And tried to be near Shiori.
So far, there's no unusual changes.

No way!! 
I'm going right now!!
Going to the bathroom with your older sister!?

It's okay!
I'll take care of her!
Come on, Akari-chan, I'll carry you!
Then I'm counting on you. Be careful.

At that moment, just a moment…
Just a moment…
We lost sight of Shiori…

Shinpei!! Did you see it?!
What happened to Shiori!!

When I noticed… 
She was gone… just the floatie remained!!

Sorry… this is "memory"…
I can't recreate places no one saw…
(…Right! I need to watch Shiori properly…)

(Where am I now?
Not far from the tide…)

At that moment, just a moment…
Just a moment…
We lost sight of Shiori…

Shinpei!! Did you see it?!
What happened to Shiori!!

No… the view's messed up…
When I saw it, she was gone…
Just the floatie remained!!

Sorry… this is "memory"…
I can't recreate places no one saw…

Ushio! In the sea!!
I can feel a shadow!!

Mio, Sou!
Leave it to me!!
I'll take care of Akari!

Shiori!!
I'll take you up now!!

Look! The shadow's…
It's getting messy!!
In the sea, shadow's body drifts as endless debris—stuck to plankton surfaces, drifting near solids.

Even if you try to cut it, it's dispersed into particles,
Moving with the water and hard to catch.
It was impossible to defeat it here.

So the top priority wasn't to defeat the shadow,
But to save Shiori's life!!

At that time, Shiori wasn't breathing.
I rushed to the surface…

What was that voice!?
Where… Oh!?

A part of the separated shadow…
Still attached to Shiori's feet!!
It's decided for that child. Take her away.

I got caught by that guy and became like a sleep paralysis victim…
I couldn't move at all.

When a shadow grabs a solid object, you can't move…
At that time, I still didn't realize that…

Guh… idiot!!
What are you staring at?!!!

I'll reset their personality and memories…  
I'll return you to normal.

Tch.  
Sou and Mio are…getting closer…

I…!  
Together with Shinpei, I'll defeat the Shadow!!

From the 24th summer festival…  
I'll save everyone!!

…This is the end of the footage.  
All that happened that day…

Faked fainting…Mio helped me…  
That guy switched with Shiori…!

It's not allowed…
  I want to kill them with my own hands…

(That guy… the Shadow Shiori already killed her at the Koba Mart…
  But…)
Who said what should be done?
developer_comments: 少女の声（シオリ（ハイネ））

target: I… I just heard a voice…

The video's been frozen since earlier!
  Only we can talk in this space…!

O-oh, Ushio… This is a video, right!?
  You can't touch or talk to it…!!

That's crazy!!!
  I don't remember this!!!

Something's wrong…
  End the video already, Ushio!!!

I'll go back!!
  Take us back to our original reality!
I've been searching for a long time since then.
